prompt: Studio product shot of a natural heavy canvas tote bag hanging flat against a neutral warm background. A single orange AITX open-arms mark centered on the front, screen-printed. A short NVIDIA-green #76b900 accent stripe on the strap, and tiny plain neutral text under the mark reading "AITX x NVIDIA". Clean premium merch, soft shadow. IMPORTANT LOGO RULES: The ONLY logo anywhere is the orange AITX open-arms mark (a friendly figure with open arms, AITX orange #ff4201, from the passed reference image). Do NOT render the NVIDIA logo, the NVIDIA eye/GPU icon, or any NVIDIA wordmark graphic. The word 'NVIDIA' may appear ONLY as very small, plain, neutral sans-serif text as a collaboration credit, set apart from the AITX mark (like a discreet tag or hem credit), never stylized as a brand logo and never combined with the AITX mark. NVIDIA green #76b900 appears only as a small accent detail; AITX orange leads.
